name: Ferplast Club Collar C15/44 Pink
shortDescription: The FERPLAST CLUB COLLAR C15/44 in pink is a practical, stylish, and durable nylon collar designed for everyday use. Perfect for small to medium-sized dogs, it combines comfort, adjustability, and strength to make daily walks safer and more enjoyable.
description: Whether you’re heading out for a casual stroll, training sessions, or everyday wear, the FERPLAST CLUB COLLAR C15/44 offers a secure, comfortable, and stylish solution. With its vibrant pink color, it adds a touch of personality while keeping your dog safe and comfortable. Benefits: • Comfortable for your dog thanks to the lightweight yet robust design. • Durable construction ensures long-lasting performance. • Easy to maintain and clean, even after outdoor adventures. • Adjustable fit accommodates slight size changes, ensuring consistent comfort.
